---
title: "About"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/swatts123/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/sam-watts
    - icon: book
      text: Resume
      href: https://swatts.xyz/resume/
comments: false
---

👋 Hey!

I’m Sam. Right now I work in Machine Learning. I also like to write stuff from time to time.
